ground_truth.title: Online Shoe Making Courses | learn to make shoes | Carreducker
ground_truth.main_content: Online Courses & Tutorials. Online handsewn shoemaking videos and tutorials. Study, practice & build a strong foundation in handsewn shoe making. Testimonial from Gitty Duncan: "This is so exciting!!! I'm enjoying your shoe making videos! Progress is being made!!! It's working! This is truly a game changer, learning these techniques for construction...this is a far superior system. Even though it takes longer. Totally worth the effort." Products available: Tutorials category (6 items); Handsewn Shoe Making Video – Taking Foot Measurements – Download (£150); Handsewn Shoe Making Videos – 6 Modules to download (£450); Module 1: Preparation (£85); Module 2: Hand Lasting (£85); Module 3: Welting (£85); Module 4: Soling (£85); Module 5: Heel Building (£85); Module 6: Finishing – Parts I, II & III (£85); Shoe Pattern Making Course – Oxford & Brogue (£545); Shoe Pattern Making Video & Course – Derby & Derby Boot (£799); ZOOM Shoe Making Support (£40); Derby Shoe Pattern Making Video – Module 1: Designing on the Last (£99); Module 2: The Standard (£99); Module 3: The Pattern Pieces (£99); Modules 1, 2 & 3 (£275); Pattern Making for Shoes – The Loafer – 1-to-1 training (£525).
with: Online handsewn shoemaking videos and tutorials.
Study, practice & build a strong foundation in handsewn shoe making.
